body.title: goal_continuation: add human-author gate + claim attempt cap
body.result: Added D259 human-author gate (_is_human_recently_active) that reads cc_channel/messages.jsonl and skips goal continuation if no human (claude-code/akien) has been active in the last 30 minutes. Also added claim_attempt_count tracking in goal metadata — hard-stops at 3 attempts and posts GOAL BLOCKED to channel, preventing indefinite re-claims on crash+restart cycles.
body.description: goal_continuation.py runs every 120s unattended (line 21). Missing D259 human-author check — goal auto-advances even when last turn was background (not claude-code/akien). Also: no claim attempt cap, so crash+restart can re-claim same ticket indefinitely. Fix: (1) gate goal_continuation to only fire if most recent turn author is in _HUMAN_AUTHORS (D259); (2) increment per-goal claim_attempt_count in metadata, hard-stop at >2; (3) add file-based lock on queue.json during claim. Safety finding from deep-audit Panel 5.
